Svegliati in piena notte: “Hanno distrutto la pizzeria”. Ennesima spaccata a Firenze, parlano i gestori
content: Firenze, 18 maggio 2026 - Spaccata nella notte ai danni della pizzeria Laverace di piazza Gavinana, a Firenze. Ignoti hanno sfondato la vetrata del locale utilizzando un tombino e sono riusciti a entrare all’interno portando via il cassetto della cassa. A raccontare quanto accaduto è il titolare Francesco Maruca , svegliato intorno alle 3 da una telefonata. https://www.lanazione.it/siena/cronaca/schermitrice-stuprata-assolti-ove9a10p La testimonianza del titolare “Ci hanno chiamato in piena notte per avvisarci – racconta – Quando siamo arrivati abbiamo trovato la vetrata distrutta e il locale sottosopra”. Sul posto sono intervenuti gli agenti della polizia e, nella mattinata, anche la Scientifica per i rilievi. Secondo quanto riferito dal titolare, durante il colpo i malviventi si sarebbero anche feriti. “Hanno lasciato tracce di sangue , probabilmente si sono tagliati mentre rompevano la vetrata”. Quartiere in allarme Il cassetto della cassa è stato ritrovato poco distante dal locale, dietro un bidone della spazzatura. All'interno il fondocassa, mentre resta il danno alla struttura e la paura per un episodio che scuote il quartiere. “È la prima volta che succede da quando abbiamo aperto, nel 2021 – spiega Maruca – ma ormai è difficile dormire tranquilli. La microcriminalità sta peggiorando e chi lavora vive con l’ansia di ritrovarsi il locale devastato”. Il titolare punta poi il dito anche sulle difficoltà economiche che stanno vivendo le attività della zona a causa dei cantieri della tramvia. “Già i lavori ci hanno portato un calo degli incassi del 50 per cento. Adesso anche episodi come questo diventano un colpo durissimo per chi cerca di andare avanti”.

title: Bibbia, sigarette e l’incontro con un prete: cosa ha chiesto Salim dal carcere
content: Modena, 18 maggio 2026 – "Sono uscito perché quel giorno morivo. Non volevo fare del male a nessuno" . Sono le parole che Salim El Koudri avrebbe detto in un colloquio in carcere con il suo legale, l’avvocato Fausto Giannelli, riferendosi a quanto successo sabato 16 maggio. Il 31enne di Ravarino, nato a Bergamo e di origini marocchine, ha investito e ferito otto persone , fiondandosi con la sua auto a 100 all’ora in centro a Modena. Al momento è in isolamento e l’udienza di convalida a suo carico è stata rinviata a domani, deve rispondere di strage e lesioni aggravate dall'uso del coltello. Secondo la Procura di Modena che collabora con la Digos di Bologna al momento non ci sono elementi che possono far ricondurre i fatti di sangue ad una matrice terroristica. Si è comunque alla ricerca di un movente e dalle parole di El Koudri riferite al legale ne esce un racconto vago e annebbiato , con ricordi che spesso dovevano essere stimolati dall’avvocato, che riferisce quanto il suo assistito sia “in una situazione di assoluta confusione mentale e sembra vivere per la prima volta le memorie quando gli racconto la dinamica di quello che è accaduto quando gli racconto. In certi momenti è sorpreso e assolutamente inconsapevole”. https://www.ilrestodelcarlino.it/modena/cronaca/bastardi-cristiani-email-salim-modena-yvuwf6oo “Che cosa tremenda”: Kalim non si rende conto della tragedia "Andavo più forte che potevo" , ha detto El Koudri. E quando è stato informato delle condizioni dei feriti, tra cui la donna che ha perso le gambe, avrebbe risposto: "Che cosa tremenda" . "È rimasto atterrito – riferisce il legale – mi ha chiesto conferma come se fosse qualcosa capitata a un altro. Non sembra capire la dinamica e non ha memoria di quello che ha fatto . Credo sia urgente una perizia psichiatrica ”. https://www.ilrestodelcarlino.it/modena/cronaca/mio-figlio-urlava-al-telefono-mamma-aiutami-inferno-dei-feriti-di-modena-kaxgjn3l La richiesta di una Bibbia e di parlare con un prete Salim El Koudri avrebbe chiesto dei libri da leggere , sigarette , ma anche una Bibbia e di poter parlare con un prete , perché “ho bisogno di qualcuno che mi capisca”. " Domande singolari – continua Giannelli – perché non è un musulmano credente lo sapevamo, ma neppure un praticante cattolico”. Avrebbe fatto queste richieste ancor prima di poter vedere la famiglia , che a contrario di lui è “pienamente lucida, sono annichiliti dal dolore per la donna che ha perso le gambe. La famiglia...

title: Yailin revela que intentó quitarse la vida en más de una ocasión antes del nacimiento de su hija
content: La cantante dominicana Yailin La Más Viral mostró su lado más vulnerable la noche del domingo durante su participación en el reality show Planeta Alofoke, donde reveló que atravesó una profunda depresión antes del nacimiento de su hija, Cattleya. Entre lágrimas, la artista conversó con el creador de contenido Carlos Montesquieu y confesó que, durante esa etapa de su vida, llegó a intentar quitarse la vida en varias ocasiones debido al dolor emocional y la tristeza que sentía. “Yo no quería vivir. Hubo muchas oportunidades en las que yo decía que no quería más. Me cortaba, me tomaba pastillas... incluso estando embarazada de ella, porque yo decía que yo era muy buena y el mundo no me lo reconocía”, expresó la intérprete de “Bing Bong”. Puedes leer: Gallo The Producer agradece a Santiago Matías tras su victoria en Planeta Alofoke y envía mensaje a sus haters La cantante explicó que, a pesar de atravesar uno de los momentos más difíciles de su vida, el embarazo de su hija se convirtió en la razón que la motivó a seguir adelante. “Yo quiero mucho a mi hermana, a mi mamá y a mi familia, pero si no fuera por mi hija, yo no estuviera en este mundo. Ella me dio una razón para vivir”, dijo emocionada. Las declaraciones de Yailin La Más Viral han generado un fuerte impacto en redes sociales, especialmente porque muchos seguidores relacionan ese difícil período con la etapa en que mantenía una relación con el rapero puertorriqueño Anuel AA. Anteriormente, la artista ya había hablado públicamente sobre la depresión posparto que sufrió tras el nacimiento de su hija, en medio de las controversias que rodearon su vida personal y su matrimonio con el cantante urbano. Esta confesión se convierte en uno de los relatos más personales y vulnerables de la reconocida artista de música urbana dominicana, evidenciando una vez más que muchos famosos enfrentan desafíos que no son vistos públicamente.

Sanidad prevé que el nuevo Centro de Salud de Vinaròs II entre en funcionamiento a principios de 2027
content: El conseller de Sanidad, Marciano Gómez, junto con la alcaldesa de Vinaròs, Ma Dolores Miralles, ha visitado las obras del nuevo Centro Sanitario Integrado (CSI) Vinaròs II, cuya entrada en funcionamiento está prevista para principios de 2027. Durante la visita, el conseller destacó que las obras avanzan según lo previsto y subrayó que el nuevo centro permitirá responder a una demanda histórica de la población de Vinaròs , que desde 2017 reclamaba un aumento de los recursos asistenciales. La infraestructura, ubicada en el sector SUR 17 de la ciudad, cuenta con una inversión superior a los 8 millones de euros y una superficie de 1.950 metros cuadrados. El nuevo CSI Vinaròs II dispondrá de servicios de Medicina de Familia, Pediatría, área de Extracciones y Tratamientos, Unidad de Fisioterapia con gimnasio y Punto de Atención Continuada , además de espacios administrativos y de descanso para los profesionales sanitarios. Además de este proyecto, la Conselleria de Sanidad ha anunciado la ampliación de las consultas externas del hospital comarcal de Vinaròs , una actuación que contará con una inversión de 2,3 millones de euros. La ampliación permitirá incorporar 18 nuevas consultas destinadas principalmente a Oftalmología y Traumatología, mejorando tanto la capacidad asistencial como el confort de pacientes y profesionales. Entre las nuevas instalaciones previstas se incluyen consultas especializadas, salas de yesos y curas, espacios para tratamientos oftalmológicos y una sala de Tomografía de Coherencia Óptica (OCT). En materia de salud mental , la Generalitat también proyecta la construcción de un nuevo edificio junto al hospital de Vinaròs con una inversión superior a los 9 millones de euros. El futuro centro contará con 10 camas de hospitalización para pacientes de Salud Mental , consultas externas de Psiquiatría y Psicología, unidad de conductas adictivas, Unidad de Hospitalización Domiciliaria y un helipuerto en la cubierta. Asimismo, el conseller destacó el refuerzo de personal en el área de salud mental , que desde septiembre de 2024 ha incrementado su plantilla en un 47 %, con la incorporación de nueve nuevos profesionales de distintas especialidades. Por último, Sanidad trabaja en nuevas medidas incentivadoras para atraer y retener profesionales sanitarios en zonas de difícil cobertura como Vinaròs. En este sentido, el departamento de salud ha ofertado 94 vacantes para especialistas dentro del concurso de...

Kayıp olarak aranan kadının, cezaevinden izinli çıkan eski eşi tarafından öldürüldüğü ortaya çıktı
content: KONYA'da geçen yıl kaybolan Muazzez Bayhan'ın (43), cezaevinden izinli çıkıp firar eden boşandığı Münür Turhan (46) tarafından başından tabancayla vurularak öldürülüp, dere yatağına gömüldüğü ortaya çıktı. 40'ın üzerinde suç kaydı ve 22 yıl kesinleşmiş hapis cezası bulunan cezaevindeki Münür Turhan hakkında, 'Kasten öldürme' suçundan fezleke hazırlandı.Olay, geçen yıl 27 Haziran'da Cihanbeyli ilçesinde meydana geldi. Muazzez Bayhan, 2 çocuğuyla evdeyken cezaevinden izinli çıkan boşandığı Münür Turhan tarafından alınarak götürüldü. Geri dönmeyen Bayhan'dan haber alamayan yakınları, kayıp başvurusunda bulundu. Bu sırada firari duruma düşen Turhan da 3 gün sonra yakalandı. Boşandığı eşinin kayıp olduğu sorulan Turhan, bilgisinin olmadığını söyledi. Turhan, tekrar cezaevine gönderildi.KEMİK PARÇALARI BULUNDU Cihanbeyli İlçe Jandarma Komutanı Üsteğmen Mehmet Erol koordinesinde Jandarma Suç Araştırma Timi (JASAT) eşliğinde özel ekip kuruldu. Özel ekip, ilçedeki tüm özel ve kamuya ait güvenlik kamerası kayıtlarını inceledi. HTS kayıtları da incelemeye alındı. Kayıp Bayhan'ın yakınları ve gidebileceği noktaları tek tek araştırıldı. Ekipler, 16 Eylül 2025'te İnsuyu Mahallesi yakınlarında bir dere yatağında bir kısmı toprağın yüzeyine çıkan gömülü kafatası ve kemik parçalarına ulaştı. DNA ÖRNEKLERİ ALINDIBulunan kafatası ve kemik parçalarının Bayhan'a ait olabileceği değerlendirilerek ailesinden DNA örnekleri alınıp İstanbul Adli Tıp Kurumu'na gönderildi. Yapılan teste, bulunan parçaların Bayhan'a ait olduğu belirlendi. ÖLDÜRÜP DERE YATAĞINA GÖMMÜŞ Ekipler, cinayet şüphelisinin Bayhan'ın eski eşi Münür Turhan olabileceğini değerlendirip, soruşturmayı bu yönde yoğunlaştırdı. Ekipler, Turhan'ın, alkollü şekilde evine gittiği eski eşi Muazzez Bayhan'ı alıp, 'kıskançlık' nedeniyle kavga ettiği ve İnsuyu Mahallesi'nde bulunan Alibey Yaylası'na götürdüğünü saptadı. Münür Turhan'ın burada Bayhan'ı tabancayla başından vurarak öldürdüğü, cesedini araca koyup 5 kilometre uzaklıktaki dere yatağına götürerek gömdüğü tespit edildi. Turhan'ın cinayetten sonra bir sarrafa bozdurduğu altın kolyenin de öldürdüğü eski eşine ait olduğu saptandı. 'KASTEN ÖLDÜRME' SUÇUNDAN FEZLEKE Tüm delillerin toplanmasının ardından 'Hırsızlık', 'Adam yaralama', 'Cinsel taciz', 'Uyuşturucu kullanmak' gibi 40'ın üzerinde suçtan sabıkası ve 22 yıl...

Galaxy A57, Galaxy A06 get May 2026 security update
content: Alongside developing One UI 9.0 (Android 17) and rolling out One UI 8.5 (Android 16 QPR2) for Galaxy smartphones, Samsung is also pushing the May 2026 security patch to its phones and tablets and to that extent, the brand has now released the latest security update to two more devices, the Galaxy A57 and the Galaxy A06 5G . Currently, Samsung is rolling out the May 2026 security patch for the Galaxy A57 in Malaysia and for the Galaxy A06 in India. The latest updates for these phones carry firmware versions A576BXXS2AZE2 and A066BXXS6BZE1 , respectively ( via Mohammed Khatri ). The May 2026 security patch fixes 36 security vulnerabilities . Samsung may also be rolling out the updates in other countries as we speak. You can check the availability and get it by going to Settings > Software update > Download and install . While the Galaxy A57 is already running Samsung’s latest Android customisation for Galaxy smartphones, One UI 8.5, the Galaxy A06 is eligible to get it, and the update may arrive in the next few months.

Rafael López Aliaga descarta reunión con Keiko Fujimori y critica encuentro con PPK: ¿Con quién se junta?
content: El excandidato presidencial Rafael López Aliaga señaló que no contempla sostener un encuentro con la lideresa de Fuerza Popular, Keiko Fujimori en el actual escenario político. Durante una entrevista en el programa Sin Medias Tintas, el exalcalde de Lima explicó que antes de cualquier acercamiento, considera necesario resolver cuestionamientos relacionados con el proceso electoral. “Nunca. Primero quiero salir de este tema.Primero quiero saber la verdad...”, respondió. En ese sentido, el líder de Renovación Popular remarcó que cualquier conversación política deberá esperar hasta que se aclaren los cuestionamientos que mantiene sobre las elecciones. Ver esta publicación en Instagram Una publicación compartida de Latina Noticias (@latinanoticias.pe) Critica encuentro entre Keiko Fujimori y Pedro Pablo Kuczynski López Aliaga también cuestionó la reciente reunión entre Keiko Fujimori y el expresidente Pedro Pablo Kuczynski en el marco de la segunda vuelta electoral. Además, aseguró que un encuentro con el expresidente sería algo que evitaría en cualquier circunstancia. “¿Con quién se junta [Keiko Fujimori]?. La última persona con la que yo me reuniría es con PPK”, cuestionó. ¿Qué dijo sobre el Caso Rutas de Lima ? El exalcalde de Lima también abordó el proceso de discovery impulsado por la Municipalidad Metropolitana de Lima contra la empresa Brookfield en Estados Unidos . En esa línea, indicó que dentro de ese caso figura la participación de Pedro Pablo Kuczynski a través de la empresa Westfield Capital en operaciones vinculadas al proyecto Rutas de Lima. López Aliaga señaló que estas indagaciones están relacionadas con presuntas irregularidades en la intermediación de decisiones empresariales. Además, mencionó que el caso involucra a la exalcaldesa Susana Villarán en el contexto de las investigaciones. El dirigente político anunció que no asumirá un eventual escaño en el Senado pese a la participación de su agrupación en el proceso electoral. Según precisó, su decisión responde a una postura personal respecto a su continuidad en cargos de representación. Por otro lado, precisó que Renovación Popular sí tendrá presencia en el Parlamento mediante un accesitario. Con ello indicó que la organización política mantendrá representación en el próximo periodo legislativo. Drishyam 3 Box Office prediction: Mohanlal’s film likely to cross Rs 10 crore-mark on opening day
content: New Delhi: The highly-anticipated upcoming Malayalam movie, Drishyam 3 , headlined by superstar Mohanlal , is set to release in theatres on May 21. Directed by Jeethu Joseph, the film's advance booking already began, and the collection so far is impressive. In the third installment, Georgekutty returns one last time to protect his family, no matter the cost. Now, let's explore how much the film is expected to mint on its opening day. Drishyam 3 box office prediction In an exclusive conversation with News9 Digital, trade analyst Ramesh Bala also opined on Drishyam 3 collections. He told us that the film will earn Rs 10 crore from South itself. He shared, "The buzz is quite strong in the South, especially in Kerala and Bengaluru. Kerala has a huge audience base, and Bengaluru also has a large Malayali population. The advance booking trends in both regions are looking promising. As far as the opening is concerned, I think the film can collect around Rs 10 crore down South. For a Mohanlal film, that’s a good opening.” He also opened up about the film and said, "People are coming to watch the film because of the franchise value and the thriller element associated with it. However, this time, the film leans more towards emotions than thrills, which is probably why some viewers feel it may not be the best idea. I understand that a film like this is generally expected to have stronger thriller elements. But let’s wait and watch. It’s very difficult to predict what the audience will feel just three days before the release." https://www Drishyam 3 advance booking According to industry tracker, Jerin Georgekutty, Mohanlal's Drishyam 3 has already crossed Rs 14 crore in worldwide advance booking sales in India for its opening day. While Kerala is leading with good collection, Telugu states and Karnataka follow behind. Well, Drishyam 3 has already crossed Rs 10 crore-mark at the box office through its advance booking sales. About Drishyam 3 Drishyam franchise was remade in Hindi starring Ajay Devgn. However, for the third installment, the makers will not directly adapt the Malayalam version. The Hindi version, in fact, will adopt a different screenplay and narrative, though both movies pick up from where the previous installment ended.

Mets rompen racha de 96 derrotas y dejan en el terreno a Yankees en un clásico inolvidable
content: Estados Unidos.- Los New York Mets protagonizaron una de las remontadas más memorables de su temporada al vencer 7-6 en 10 entradas a los New York Yankees y quedarse con la Serie del Subway en un electrizante duelo disputado en Citi Field. Te puede interesar: Junior Caminero y Yandy Díaz impulsan victoria de Rays sobre Marlins Cuando todo parecía perdido y la derrota lucía inevitable, los Mets reaccionaron en el momento más inesperado para romper una histórica racha negativa. El equipo neoyorquino no ganaba un partido viniendo de atrás después de ocho entradas desde el Juego 3 de la Serie de Comodines de la Liga Nacional de 2024, acumulando 96 derrotas consecutivas en esa situación. Con dos outs en la baja del noveno inning y apenas un cinco por ciento de probabilidades de victoria, apareció Tyrone Taylor para cambiar la historia. El jardinero disparó un dramático cuadrangular de tres carreras por el jardín izquierdo que empató el encuentro y devolvió la vida a unos Mets golpeados por lesiones y dudas durante las últimas semanas. La celebración se completó en el décimo episodio, cuando Carson Benge provocó la jugada decisiva con un batazo que terminó en selección defensiva, permitiendo la carrera del triunfo y desatando la euforia de los aficionados locales. El dominicano Juan Soto fue uno de los primeros en salir del dugout para unirse a la celebración junto a sus compañeros, en una escena que reflejó el alivio y la emoción del conjunto metropolitano. Durante gran parte de la tarde, el panorama fue complicado para los Mets. Un error defensivo de Bo Bichette abrió la puerta para un rally de cuatro carreras de los Yankees en el sexto inning, mientras el dominicano Freddy Peralta volvió a tener dificultades para trabajar profundo en el juego. Sin embargo, el relevo respondió. Sean Manaea logró estabilizar el encuentro tras un inicio complicado, retirando a seis de los últimos siete bateadores que enfrentó. Además, el venezolano Luis Torrens aportó un importante doble remolcador de dos carreras como bateador emergente. El dirigente venezolano Carlos Mendoza destacó la capacidad de reacción de su equipo pese a las adversidades y las múltiples lesiones que han afectado al roster. La victoria permitió a los Mets quedarse con dos de los tres partidos de la tradicional Serie del Subway y recuperar confianza en un momento clave de la temporada, demostrando que todavía tienen argumentos para mantenerse en la pelea dentro de la...

Organizaciones envían condolencias por la muerte de Carmen Navas
content: Caracas.- Distintas organizaciones y figuras enviaron mensajes de condolencias por el fallecimiento de la señora Carmen Teresa Navas, madre de Víctor Hugo Quero.​ Cáritas Venezuela compartió un mensaje de condolencias por la partida física de Navas, a través de un comunicado donde afirmaron: «expresamos nuestro sentir con dolor y consternación ante el sensible fallecimiento de la señora Carmen Navas, acaecido el día de hoy, 17 de mayo de 2026 «. «En este momento de duelo, nos acercamos con profunda empatía y solidaridad a sus seres queridos y al país. Pedimos fervientemente al Espíritu Santo que conceda fortaleza a la familia Quero Navas para sobrellevar este nuevo y desgarrador dolor. Así como hace unos días rogábamos que la Virgen María Dolorosa abrazara en esperanza a doña Carmen en medio de su sufrimiento por la trágica muerte y exhumación de Víctor Hugo, hoy le pedimos a nuestra Madre del Cielo que la reciba en su regazo eterno, donde ya no hay llanto ni dolor» , reza parte del resto del comunicado. Ver esta publicación en Instagram Una publicación compartida de Cáritas Venezuela (@caritasdevzla) En otros comunicados, a través de su cuenta de Instagram, el cardenal Baltazar Porras lamentó el fallecimiento y publicó una nota de duelo en honor a la madre de 81 años. Ver esta publicación en Instagram Una publicación compartida de Cardenal Baltazar Porras Cardozo | Cuenta Oficial (@cardenalbaltazarporras) Monseñor Raúl Biord Castillo, arzobispo de la Arquidiócesis de Caracas, dio sus condolencias en unión a sus obispos auxiliares y todo el clero. A través de una publicación de redes sociales expresaron la consternación de la Iglesia caraqueña por el triste fallecimiento de la Señora Carmen Navas, quien «murió trágica y lamentablemente, estando privado de libertad por razones políticas.» Ver esta publicación en Instagram Una publicación compartida de Arquidiócesis de Caracas (@arquidiocesisdecaracas) Foro Penal publicó un mensaje de condolencias donde aseguró que «perdemos a una mujer valiente que, a pesar del inmenso dolor, nunca se resignó al olvido.» Ver esta publicación en Instagram Una publicación compartida de Foro Penal (@foropenal) Lea también: Dos nuevas ondas tropicales se aproximan al país Unión Radio

É melhor Irã ‘se mexer rápido, ou não sobrará nada deles’, volta a ameaçar Trump
content: O presidente dos Estados Unidos, Donald Trump, voltou a ameaçar o Irã neste domingo, 17, em meio a um frágil cessar-fogo no confronto que ocorre há três meses entre EUA, Israel e o país persa. “Para o Irã, o relógio está correndo, e é melhor eles se mexerem, RÁPIDO, ou não sobrará nada deles. O tempo é fundamental!”, escreveu o republicano em uma postagem na Truth Social, em referência à falta de ação dos líderes iranianos. Trump tem repetidamente estabelecido prazos para Teerã, mas acaba voltando atrás, enquanto as tratativas para um acordo de paz seguem em um impasse. O Irã, por sua vez, tem se mostrado inclinado a escalar o conflito. Neste domingo, apresentadores da TV estatal iraniana apareceram no ar segurando fuzis, e um deles atirou contra uma bandeira dos Emirados Árabes Unidos, que sofreu um ataque de drone hoje em uma instalação nuclear. O cessar-fogo com o Irã segue instável, e fracassaram os esforços diplomáticos voltados a uma paz mais duradoura. Enquanto isso, os combates se intensificaram entre Israel e o grupo libanês Hezbollah, apesar de um cessar-fogo em vigor no Líbano. (*Com informações da Associated Press) The post É melhor Irã ‘se mexer rápido, ou não sobrará nada deles’, volta a ameaçar Trump appeared first on InfoMoney .

Hallan cadáver en estado de descomposición en el río Yaque del Norte
content: Santiago.- El cadáver de una persona aún sin identificar fue recuperado la tarde de ayer domingo en estado de descomposición en las aguas del río Yaque del Norte, en un hecho ocurrido en el sector La Peñita, frente a las instalaciones de Coraasan de esta ciudad La alerta fue emitida alrededor de las 6:00 de la tarde del domingo por agentes de la Policía Nacional, luego de que el cuerpo fuera visto siendo arrastrado por la corriente del afluente. Según explicó el director de la defensa Civil de esta ciudad, Francisco Arias informó que tras el hecho de inmediato, unidades del Departamento Acuático de la Defensa Civil del comité de Bellavista desplegaron un operativo de rescate que culminó con la extracción del cadáver, posteriormente entregado al Instituto Nacional de Ciencias Forenses (INACIF), la Fiscalía y el Departamento de Homicidios para los procedimientos correspondientes. Te puede interesar: Enero fue el mes con más muertes registradas en el país durante 2025 Hasta el momento, las autoridades no han logrado identificar a la víctima, debido a que no portaba documentos personales. Las autoridades solicitaron a ciudadanos con familiares desaparecidos acudir al INACIF de Santiago para colaborar con el proceso de identificación.

title: Bank of Cyprus approves record dividend payout for 2025
content: The Bank of Cyprus (BoC) on Monday announced that shareholders approved a final cash dividend of €0.50 per share for the 2025 financial year , marking the largest payout since the bank resumed distributions in 2022. The approval followed the outcome of the annual general meeting held on May 15, confirming a total dividend of €0.70 per share when combined with the interim dividend of €0.20 already paid in October 2025. The bank said the total distribution amounts to €305 million , representing an increase of approximately 25 per cent year-on-year . This corresponds to a 70 per cent payout ratio , placing it at the top end of the group’s stated 2025 distribution policy. The dividend will go ex-dividend on May 25, 2026, with a record date set for May 26, 2026. Moreover, payment is scheduled to be made on June 24, 2026 to shareholders listed on the register as of the record date. The method of payment will depend on how shares are held, with different arrangements applying across Cyprus Stock Exchange (CSE) depositary interests , Euronext Athens holdings , and Euroclear system participants . For investors holding shares through the Cyprus Stock Exchange system , payments will be made either via electronic transfer or cheque, based on details recorded in the central securities registry, the bank said. Those holding shares through Euronext Athens or the Euroclear system will receive payments via their respective participants, with Euroclear Bank acting as paying agent . Shareholders registered directly on the company’s books will receive their dividend through cheque or electronic transfer, with MUFG Corporate Markets Trustees (Nominees) Limited serving as the paying agent. The bank also issued an important notice to depositary interest holders , stating that this will be the final dividend where payments may be made by cheque. It explained that future distributions are expected to be made solely via electronic transfer , following amendments to the company’s articles of association approved at the AGM. Under the revised framework, the board has discretion to require electronic payments , and may retain dividend amounts if shareholders have not provided valid bank account details. Any such retained amounts may be forfeited after six years if left unclaimed , in line with the company’s articles. The bank urged shareholders who have not yet submitted their bank details to do so promptly in order to avoid delays or potential loss of future payments. It also stated...

title: ‘Jharsuguda records 42.8°C’: Extreme heat and humidity grip Odisha as summer intensifies
IPL 2026 : आरसीबी प्लेऑफमध्ये, 3 जागांसाठी 7 संघांत चुरस, केकेआर-पंजाबला किती संधी?
content: आयपीएल 2026 स्पर्धेतील प्लेऑफचं वेळापत्रक काही आठवड्यांआधी जाहीर करण्यात आलं. तेव्हापासून क्रिकेट चाहत्यांना प्लेऑफमध्ये पोहचणाऱ्या अंतिम 4 संघांची प्रतिक्षा आहे. दरवर्षी प्लेऑफसाठी चुरस असते. टॉप 2 मध्ये आपलं आव्हान राखणाऱ्या संघांना अंतिम फेरीत पोहचण्याची 1 संधी जास्त मिळते. त्यामुळे टॉप 2 साठी चढाओढ असते. मात्र यंदा चित्र उलट आहे. या 19 व्या हंगामात तब्बल 61 सामन्यांच्या प्रतिक्षेनंतर प्लेऑफसाठी पहिला संघ अधिकृतरित्या पात्र ठरला. रविवारी 17 मे रोजी डबल हेडरमधील पहिल्या सामन्यात पंजाब किंग्स विरुद्ध गतविजेता रॉयल चॅलेंजर्स बंगळुरु आमनेसामने होते. आरसीबीने पंजाबला पराभूत करत प्लेऑफचं तिकीट मिळवलं. त्यामुळे आता उर्वरित 3 जागांसाठी चुरस आहे. या निमित्ताने कोणत्या संघाला प्लेऑफची किती संधी आहे? हे जाणून घेणार आहोत. रविवारी 17 मे पर्यंत 19 व्या मोसमातील 62 सामने खेळवण्यात आले. आता साखळी फेरीतील आणखी 8 सामने बाकी आहेत. मात्र त्यानंतरही प्लेऑफचा पेच कायम आहे. प्लेऑफसाठी 1 संघ निश्चित झाला आहे. तर 3 जागा रिक्त आहेत. या 3 जागांसाठी 7 संघांत चुरस आहे. 2 संघांचा पत्ता कट या हंगामातून लखनौ सुपर जायंट्स आणि मुंबई इंडियन्सचं पॅकअप झालंय. तर आरसीबी प्लेऑफमध्ये पोहचली आहे. त्यामुळे 3 संघांचा विषय संपलाय. तसेच 3 जागांसाठी 7 संघ शर्यतीत आहेत. मात्र त्यापैकी काही संघांची शक्यता इतरांच्या तुलनेत कमी आहे. गुजरात टायन्टस, सनरायझर्स हैदराबाद, पंजाब किंग्स, चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स, राजस्थान रॉयल्स, दिल्ली कॅपिट्ल्स आणि कोलकाता नाईट रायडर्स हे 7 संघ प्लेऑफच्या शर्यतीत आहेत. 18 मे रोजीचा सामना निर्णायक आरसीबीनंतर सलग दुसऱ्या दिवशी प्लेऑफसाठी आणखी एक संघ निश्चित होऊ शकतो. गुजरात टायटन्स प्लेऑफमध्ये पोहचणारा दुसरा संघ ठरु शकतो. गुजरातच्या खात्यात 16 गुण आहेत. आयपीएल 2026 स्पर्धेत आज 18 मे रोजी चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स विरुद्ध सनरायझर्स हैदराबाद असा सामना होणार आहे. गुजरातला आजच प्लेऑफचं तिकीट मिळणार की नाही? हे या सामन्याच्या निकालावर अवलंबून असणार आहे. हैदराबादने चेन्नईला पराभूत केल्यास ऑरेंज आर्मीसह गुजरात प्लेऑफसाठी पात्र ठरेल. मात्र चेन्नई विजयी झाल्यास गुजरातसाठी चेन्नई विरुद्ध आगामी सामना निर्णायक ठरेल. गुजरात तो सामना जिंकूनही सहज प्लेऑफमध्ये पोहचू शकेल. तसेच गुजरात पराभवानंतर प्लेऑफसाठी पात्र ठरेल. मात्र गुजरातला या दरम्यान नेट रनरेटकडे लक्ष द्यावं लागेल. हैदराबादचं प्लेऑफचं समीकरण सनरायझर्स हैदराबाद म्हणजे ऑरेंज आर्मीचे साखळी फेरीतील 2 सामने बाकी आहेत. हैदराबादकडे चेन्नईला पराभूत करुन आजच प्लेऑफमधील आपलं स्थान निश्चित करण्याची संधी आहे. मात्र तसं न झाल्यास हैदराबादकडे आणखी 1 संधी आहे. हैदराबाद आरसीबीला पराभूत करुन प्लेऑफमध्ये पोहचू शकते. तसेच गुजरात राजस्थान रॉयल्स आणि चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स या 3 संघांनाही 16 गुणांपर्यंत पोहचण्याची संधी आहे. त्यामुळे हैदराबादला नेट रनरेटकडे लक्ष...

Angriff auf Russland: Ukraine setzt Rekord mit drei Drohnentypen – einer davon war bisher unbekannt
content: Die Ukraine hat den bisher wohl größten Angriff auf Moskau seit mindestens einem Jahr gefahren. Dabei wurden auch bisher unbekannte Drohnen eingesetzt. Die ukrainische Armee setzte bei einem Angriff so viele Langstreckendrohnen wie noch nie gegen Russland ein. (Symbolbild) Bild: AP / Evgeniy Maloletka Die Ukraine hat den bisher wohl größten Angriff auf Moskau seit mindestens einem Jahr gefahren. Dabei wurden auch bisher unbekannte Drohnen eingesetzt. Die Ukraine soll in der Nacht vom 16. auf den 17. Mai den Großraum Moskau angegriffen haben. Laut russischen Angaben wurden fast 600 Drohnen abgeschossen. Der Kreml selbst sprach vom größten Angriff seit einem Jahr. Andere Beobachter:innen sprechen gar vom größten Angriff seit Kriegsbeginn. Mindestens vier Personen sollen getötet, zahlreiche weitere verletzt worden sein. Auch Wohnhäuser wurden wohl getroffen, Präsident Wolodymyr Selenskyj schrieb auf X dennoch von einer "vollkommen gerechtfertigten" Reaktion auf die Angriffe Russlands gegen ukrainische Städte. ... الوزير ناصر الدين يشارك في الجمعية العمومية للصحة العالمية والوزراء العرب يتبنون بالإجماع دعم النظام الصحي اللبناني
content: استهلّ وزير الصحة العامة الدكتور ركان ناصر الدين زيارة إلى جنيف، حيث يمثّل لبنان في أعمال الجمعية العمومية التاسعة والسبعين لـمنظمة الصحة العالمية. وشارك الوزير ناصر الدين، قبل ظهر اليوم، في اجتماع مجلس وزراء الصحة العرب، الذي تبنّى بالإجماع مشروع القرار الذي تقدّم به لبنان لدعم النظام الصحي اللبناني. كما أقرّ المجلس الكلمة العربية الموحدة في الجمعية العمومية، وتتضمن فقرة خاصة بدعم لبنان وقطاعه الصحي. ومن المقرر أن يلقي الوزير الدكتور ركان ناصر الدين غداً كلمة لبنان أمام الجمعية العمومية لمنظمة الصحة العالمية. كما سيعقد سلسلة لقاءات مع نظرائه من وزراء الصحة المشاركين، مما سيشكل مناسبة لتعزيز التعاون في مجالات الصحة وتسليط الضوء على التحديات المتزايدة التي تفرضها ظروف العدوان الإسرائيلي المستمر على لبنان، والذي لا يوفر الأطقم الصحية والاسعافية وآليات الإطفاء والاسعاف والمراكز المؤسسات الإستشفائية.

content: استهلّ وزير الصحة العامة الدكتور ركان ناصر الدين زيارة إلى جنيف، حيث يمثّل لبنان في أعمال الجمعية العمومية التاسعة والسبعين لـمنظمة الصحة العالمية. وشارك الوزير ناصر الدين، قبل ظهر اليوم، في اجتماع مجلس وزراء الصحة العرب، الذي تبنّى بالإجماع مشروع القرار الذي تقدّم به لبنان لدعم النظام الصحي اللبناني. كما أقرّ المجلس الكلمة العربية الموحدة في الجمعية العمومية، وتتضمن فقرة خاصة بدعم لبنان وقطاعه الصحي. ومن المقرر أن يلقي الوزير الدكتور ركان ناصر الدين غداً كلمة لبنان أمام الجمعية العمومية لمنظمة الصحة العالمية. كما سيعقد سلسلة لقاءات مع نظرائه من وزراء الصحة المشاركين، مما سيشكل مناسبة لتعزيز التعاون في مجالات الصحة وتسليط الضوء على التحديات المتزايدة التي تفرضها ظروف العدوان الإسرائيلي المستمر على لبنان، والذي لا يوفر الأطقم الصحية والاسعافية وآليات الإطفاء والاسعاف والمراكز المؤسسات الإستشفائية.

title: Antalya'da Şişme Bot Kurtarma Operasyonu
content: Rüzgarla Sürüklendiler Antalya’da saat 13.30 sıralarında, Konyaaltı Sahili açıklarında meydana gelen olayda, 2 genç şişme botlarıyla denizde yüzerken rüzgarın etkisiyle açığa sürüklendi. Yardım Çağrısı İstanbul’dan tatile gelen ve denizde bir süre yüzdükten sonra şişme botlarıyla açılan gençler, kısa süre içinde botlarının bir delik nedeniyle su almaya başladığını fark etti. Ekipler, 112 Acil Çağrı Merkezi’ne ulaşarak yardım talebinde bulundu. Sahil Güvenlik Hızla Müdahale Etti İhbarın ardından, Antalya Deniz Limanı Şube Müdürlüğü’ne ait Sahil Güvenlik botu hızlı bir şekilde olay yerine intikal etti ve birkaç dakika içinde gençleri kurtardı. Gençlerden Melih Aksu'nun Açıklamaları Olayı yaşayan Melih Aksu, "Konyaaltı Varyant'tan çıktık normal bir botla. Kürek çekerken oldukça uzaklaştık. Sonra botumuzun nereden delindiğini fark ettik. Su almaya başladık. Acilen Sahil Güvenliği aradık. Gerçekten Allah razı olsun, 5 dakika içinde yanımıza geldiler. Bizi kurtardılar. Ölmekten kurtulduk. Allah hepsinden razı olsun," şeklinde konuştu. ANTALYA’DA RÜZGARLA AÇIĞA SÜRÜKLENEN VE ŞİŞME BOTLARI PATLAYAN 2 KİŞİ SAHİL GÜVENLİK EKİPLERİNCE KURTARILDI.

TCA alleges financial irregularities in HCA; seeks immediate freeze on TG20 League
content: Hyderabad: Dharam Guruva Reddy, general secretary of The Telangana Cricket Association (TCA) , expressed grave concern over continuing illegalities and financial irregularities in the Hyderabad Cricket Association (HCA), which is already under CID investigation in Crime No. 02/2025, wherein arrests were made on 09 July 2025. Mr. Reddy said that despite the High Court’s supervision order dated 20 July 2025 in W.P. No. 21904 of 2025, appointing Hon’ble Justice Sri P. Naveen Rao (Retd.) to supervise HCA functioning, several illegal committees, appointments and financial decisions were allegedly carried out, showing total disregard to judicial supervision and governance norms. The TCA official asserted that the situation has now escalated into a serious threat to the integrity of Telangana cricket administration. CA further revealed that a shocking fraud has surfaced involving Oxford Blues Cricket Club, where two societies exist with the same name registered separately in District Registrar Office, Ranga Reddy and District Registrar Office, Hyderabad. The TCA generalsecretary alleged that this duplicate society identity was allegedly used to manipulate HCA electoral rolls and engineer unconstitutional control. According to TCA, Shri M. Jeevan Reddy, who became a club office bearer only on 06.11.2025, was elevated within four months and was “unanimously elected” as Honorary Secretary of HCA in March 2026, through an unnatural and suspicious process, indicating prima facie forgery, impersonation, fraudulent substitution of club identity, and election rigging. Mr. Reddy also alleged that immediately thereafter an illegal TG20 Governing Council was constituted, reportedly under Mr. Agam Rao, without AGM approval, in violation of Supreme Court approved BCCI governance norms and BCCI Constitution Rule 28. “The HCA is now allegedly planning to auction TG20 franchises at ₹3–10 Crores per team, aiming at a turnover exceeding ₹100 Crores, creating irreversible third-party rights and potential diversion of funds,” Mr Reddy said. The TCA said that it would be submitting a formal complaint seeking immediate CID action including seizure of records and freezing of TG20 accounts, and demanded a CID/CBI-monitored investigation, stating clearly that Telangana cricket cannot be converted into a private cartel auction business. Mr. Reddy also alleged there is conflict of interest in appointing Ambati Rayudu and Head of Cricket Operations of HCA and against some of the players...

Jurulatih Buriram United Dapat Info Penting Tentang Selangor
content: Jurulatih Buriram United, Mark Jackson sempat berterima kasih di atas maklumat penting tentang pasukan Selangor menjelang final ASEAN Club Championship (ACC) Shopee Cup. Selangor dan Buriram United akan bertemu dalam aksi final ACC Shopee Cup 2025-2026 dengan wakil tunggal negara ini bakal berdepan tugas hebat bagi merebut trofi dari juara bertahan. Malah, Buriram United kini berada dalam prestasi terbaik setelah berjaya menyingkirkan jaguh Liga Super Malaysia, Johor Darul Ta’zim (JDT) di separuh akhir meskipun diberi cabaran hebat. Menjelang perlawanan akhir pertama di Stadium MBPJ ini, Mark Jackson sebagai pengendali Buriram United melihat cabaran setiap kali bermain di tempat lawan adalah begitu hebat. Beliau turut berterima kasih apabila menerima maklumat berkenaan keadaan padang di Stadium MBPJ dan bakal memantau lebih lagi keadaan semasa bersama barisan kejurulatihan. ”Beraksi di luar negara bermakna kami menghadapi banyak cabaran. Saya amat berterima kasih atas maklumat tentang padang (Stadium MBPJ) itu,” ucap Mark Jackson menurut laporan SNE Sports . “Saya dan pasukan saya bekerja keras, memantau cuaca dan menganalisis faktor-faktor lain.” "Thanks for giving the information," Mark Jackson replied to SNE Sports reporter after being asked about the pitch of MBPJ Stadium in the final match : Sorawit/SNE Sports #ShopeeCup #BRUJDT #BRUTD #MarkJackson #SNESports #LifeTelco pic.twitter.com/7duCREnHUy — SNE Sports (@SNE_Sports) May 14, 2026 Perlawanan final pertama ACC Shopee Cup antara Selangor vs Buriram United bakal diadakan pada Rabu, 20 Mei 2026 dengan sepak mula dijadualkan tepat jam 9.00 malam waktu tempatan

Ovaj tech gigant vredi više od cele nemačke ekonomije: Nadmašio i Japan, UK, Francusku, Italiju...
content: Sumirano Tržišna kapitalizacija kompanije Nvidia iznosi 5,7 biliona dolara, premašujući nemački BDP od 5,45 biliona dolara Pet najvećih američkih kompanija premašuje ukupan BDP pet najvećih evropskih ekonomija Nvidia je najvrednija kompanija na svetu, premašujući ekonomije Nemačke, Japana i Ujedinjenog Kraljevstva Tržišna kapitalizacija Envidije ( Nvidia ) od 5,7 biliona dolara premašila je nemački BDP od 5,45 biliona dolara. Ukupna vrednost pet najvećih američkih kompanija sada premašuje ukupan BDP pet najvećih evropskih ekonomija. Ekonomska veličina tehnoloških giganata i multinacionalnih kompanija brzo je rasla poslednjih godina. Envidija je sredinom maja dostigla tržišnu kapitalizaciju od 5,7 biliona dolara. Kompanija sada premašuje čitavu ekonomiju Nemačke – treće najveće na svetu i najveće u Evropi , čiji bruto domaći proizvod (BDP) iznosi 5,45 biliona dolara. Envidija, američka kompanija za poluprovodnike čiji čipovi pokreću sve – od video-igara do sistema veštačke inteligencije – najvrednija je kompanija na svetu. Nakon što je u oktobru 2025. postala prva kompanija koja je premašila tržišnu kapitalizaciju od pet biliona dolara (4,38 biliona evra), njena vrednost je sredinom maja 2026. dostigla 5,7 biliona dolara (4,89 biliona evra). Nakon što je već premašila Japan i Ujedinjeno Kraljevstvo po ekonomskoj veličini, sada prema podacima Međunarodnog monetarnog fonda (MMF) prestiže i projektovani BDP Nemačke za 2026. godinu. Podaci o tržišnoj kapitalizaciji preuzeti su sa platforme Kompaniz market kep (CompaniesMarketCap) od 14. maja 2026. godine. MMF predviđa da će BDP Nemačke 2026. godine iznositi 5,45 biliona dolara (4,67 biliona evra). SAD ostaju najveća svetska ekonomija sa 32,38 biliona dolara (27,75 biliona evra), a sledi ih Kina sa 20,58 biliona dolara (17,87 biliona evra). Pošto je Nemačka najveća evropska ekonomija , činjenica da je tržišna kapitalizacija Envidije premašuje znači da je kompanija sada veća od svake evropske ekonomije, uključujući Ujedinjeno Kraljevstvo sa 4,26 biliona dolara (3,65 biliona evra), Francusku sa 3,6 biliona dolara (3,08 biliona evra), Italiju sa 2,74 biliona dolara (2,35 biliona evra) i Španiju sa 2,09 biliona dolara (1,79 biliona evra). Envidija premašuje ukupan BDP 19 zemalja EU Alfabet (Alphabet) sa 4,12 biliona evra i Epl (Apple) sa 3,75 biliona evra takođe su veći od svake evropske ekonomije osim nemačke. Francuska, sa ekonomijom vrednom 3,08...

Yunus Korkut'a 14 Yıl Hapis Cezası: Ummahan Korkut Davasında Gerekçeli Karar Açıklandı
content: Ummahan Korkut Davası Gerekçeli Karar Açıklandı Muğla'nın Köyceğiz ilçesinde, eşi Ummahan Korkut 'a şiddet uygulayarak ölümüne neden olan Yunus Korkut hakkında verilen 14 yıl hapis cezasının gerekçesi açıklandı. Mahkeme, sanığın "yemek yapmadı" ve "sadakatsizlik" gibi iddialarını haksız tahrik kapsamında değerlendirmeyerek cezada herhangi bir indirim yapmadı. Kararın Gerekçeleri ve Mağdurun Durumu Muğla 1. Ağır Ceza Mahkemesi, 30 Nisan'da kurulan mahkumiyet hükmünün hukuki gerekçelerini açıkladı. Mahkeme, sanık Yunus Korkut 'u "Eşe Karşı Kasten Yaralama Neticesinde Ölüme Neden Olma" suçundan 14 yıl hapis cezasına çarptırmıştı. Gerekçeli kararda, 25 yaşındaki Ummahan Korkut 'un ölümünün, "künt kafa travmasına bağlı kafa içi kanama ve gelişen komplikasyonları" etkisiyle meydana geldiği belirtildi. Kararda, sanığın eşine yumruk atarak yaralama kastıyla hareket ettiğine vurgu yapılarak, bu yumruğun etkisiyle Korkut'un kafasını duvara çarptığı ve olayla ölüm arasında doğrudan bir illiyet bağı olduğuna belirtildi. Yasanın Değerlendirilmesi ve Savunma Sanık Yunus Korkut , savunmasında eşinin yemek yapmadığını ve bu sebeple tartışma çıktığını iddia etti. Ancak mahkeme, yapılan teknik incelemeler ve toplanan deliller ışığında bu savunmayı dikkate almadı. Mahkeme heyeti, yemek yapmama ya da kıskançlık iddialarının haksız tahrik gerekçesi olamayacağına ve dolayısıyla cezada indirim yapılmayacağına hükmetti. Mahkeme, sanığın eylemini öldürme kastıyla gerçekleştirdiğine dair yeterli delil bulunmadığını belirterek, olayın yaralama kastı ile işlenmiş olduğu sonucuna vardı. Ummahan Korkut 'un aile avukatı Perihan Ceviz Turasay , mahkemenin haksız tahrik indiriminin reddini olumlu bulsa da, suçun vasfının yetersiz olduğu görüşünde olduğunu ifade etti. Avukat Turasay, "Bu dosya basit bir neticedir; biz caydırıcılığın sağlanması adına eşe karşı kasten öldürme suçundan ağırlaştırılmış müebbet hapis cezası verilmesini doğru buluyorduk. Bu nedenle kararı istinaf mahkemesine taşıyacağız," dedi. MUĞLA’NIN KÖYCEĞİZ İLÇESİNDE, EŞİNE UYGULADIĞI KÜNT KAFA TRAVMASINA BAĞLI KAFA İÇİ KANAMA SONUCU ÖLÜMÜNE NEDEN OLAN YUNUS KORKUT HAKKINDA VERİLEN 14 YIL HAPİS CEZASININ GEREKÇELİ KARARI AÇIKLANDI.

Brooklyn Courtroom Birth In Handcuffs Sparks Outrage
content: A 33-year-old woman gave birth inside a Brooklyn courtroom on Friday while handcuffed to a bench after more than 24 hours in city custody, according to advocates and her attorney. The delivery unfolded during an arraignment in Kings County and happened in full view of court staff, prosecutors and law enforcement, a scene that civil-rights groups say stripped her of basic medical care, privacy and dignity. According to The Independent , a coalition of public defenders — The Legal Aid Society, Brooklyn Defender Services, New York County Defender Services, The Bronx Defenders and Neighborhood Defender Service of Harlem — issued a joint statement saying Samantha Randazzo delivered "without adequate medical care, privacy, or dignity." The groups called for an "immediate and transparent investigation" into the NYPD, the Office of Court Administration, the Brooklyn District Attorney's Office and court staff, and demanded a systemwide review of how pregnant people are treated in custody. Arrest, hospital visit and arraignment Reporting states that police arrested Randazzo on Thursday after responding to the Nostrand Houses in Brooklyn, where officers found a small amount of heroin and cocaine during a search. She was taken to a nearby hospital, then discharged roughly 30 hours later and brought to Brooklyn arraignments, where she went into labor during the proceedings, according to International Business Times . Advocates note she was ineligible for a desk appearance ticket because of an outstanding warrant, a procedural detail that kept her in custody for arraignment. What court staff and her lawyer say The legal-aid coalition alleged some courtroom staff "laughed and joked" as Randazzo delivered. Her attorney, Wynton Sharpe, pushed back on that description and told reporters that court officers "reacted quickly" and that the presiding judge cleared the room. Sharpe's account was included in national coverage of the incident, and the court system had not issued an official public response at the time of reporting. The Brooklyn District Attorney's Office and the NYPD did not immediately comment, according to coverage. A decade of law, settlements and enforcement gaps New York law bans most restraints on pregnant people during labor and delivery, and amendments in 2015 expanded those protections to limit restraints during transport and the postpartum period, according to state legislative records. Advocates and past litigation say enforcement has been uneven. The...

Hacienda endurece el control: este es el máximo de dinero en efectivo que puedes usar para comprar tu próximo coche
content: Europa acaba de dar un paso decisivo que cambiará cómo compras tu próximo coche. Ya no habrá reglas distintas según el país donde te encuentres. Las nuevas directrices de la Unión Europea son claras y tienen un objetivo muy serio. Europa ha decidido unificar sus normas para combatir con mayor eficacia el blanqueo de capitales. Esta nueva estrategia es una pieza clave en la lucha contra la financiación del terrorismo a nivel internacional. Por eso, a partir del 10 de julio de 2027 , se impone un límite máximo en toda la Unión. Nadie podrá pagar más de 10.000 euros en metálico por un vehículo en territorio europeo. Con esto se busca eliminar las sombras en las grandes transacciones y asegurar que cada euro sea rastreable. Pero los controles empiezan mucho antes de llegar a esa cifra máxima. Si la compra supera los 3.000 euros, será obligatorio verificar la identidad de quien pone el dinero . Ya no habrá falta de uniformidad; las reglas serán las mismas desde España hasta Alemania. Esta normativa obligará a los concesionarios a ser mucho más estrictos con el origen de los fondos . El objetivo es cerrar cualquier grieta legal que permita mover dinero de procedencia ilícita. Así que, si planeas una compra importante, la transparencia será tu única opción legal. ¡El control del dinero en Europa entra en una nueva era mucho más vigilada!

Gas pump ‘Screw Method’ warning: How thieves can steal hundreds using your credit card
content: A new gas pump scam spreading across parts of the country could leave drivers unknowingly paying hundreds of dollars for fuel they never pumped. The scam, known as the “Screw Method,” has already been reported in states including California, Maryland and Pennsylvania. While local law enforcement agencies say they have not seen confirmed cases in the Houston area yet, officials say they are monitoring the trend closely. According to investigators, thieves use an ordinary carpenter’s screw to tamper with a gas pump and cause it to malfunction. Here’s how the scam works: A driver inserts their credit card, fills up their vehicle and returns the nozzle to the pump as normal. However, the pump allegedly does not properly shut off because it has been tampered with. Once the customer drives away, a thief can then use the same pump to continue fueling vehicles or gas cans, all while the charges continue going to the original customer’s credit card. “It’s going on nationally,” said Alan Rosen. “Anytime things become this expensive, the criminal element is going to try to enter the market.” Rosen says educating consumers is key to preventing drivers from becoming victims. Authorities recommend drivers always double-check the pump screen before leaving, monitor their credit card statements for suspicious charges and report any unusual activity at gas stations immediately. Officials also encourage customers to use tap-to-pay methods when possible and avoid leaving the pump unattended while fueling. Law enforcement agencies say the scam highlights the importance of staying alert as criminals continue finding new ways to target consumers at the pump.

Ολυμπιακός: Οι παίκτες είπαν τη λέξη που τους έρχεται στο μυαλό ενόψει Final Four – Η μοναδική αναφορά σε 4η Euroleague
content: Μια ακόμα ανάρτηση της Euroleague από την προ ημερών media day του Ολυμπιακού . Οι παίκτες του Γιλωργου Μπαρτζώκα κλήθηκαν να πουν τη λέξη που τους έρχεται στο μυαλό, ακούγοντας “Final Four Αθήνας 2026”. Ο νεαρός Γιώργος Μπουρνελές ήταν ο πιο τολμηρός από όλους τους παίκτες του Ολυμπιακού αφού απάντησε “τέταρτο”, ενοώντας την 4η Euroleague που θα προσπαθήσει να κατακτήσει η ομάδα του στο Final Four της Αθήνας. Πιο προσηλωμένος στο πρώτο εμπίδιο που υπάρχει μπροστά στον Ολυμπιακό εμφανίστηκε ο Εβάν Φουρνιέ. που απάντησε “Φενέρμπαχτσε” (σ.σ. ο ημιτελικός των Πειραιωτών) ενώ η λέξη “ευκαιρία” ειπώθηκε από τους Ντόρσεϊ και Γουόκαπ. Οι απαντήσεις: Δείτε αυτή τη δημοσίευση στο Instagram. Η δημοσίευση κοινοποιήθηκε από το χρήστη Olympiacos B.C. title: 1915 Çanakkale Köprüsünde Hayvan Denetimleri Sürüyor
content: Hayvan Denetimleri Sürüyor 1915 Çanakkale Köprüsü'nde hayvan sevk kontrolleri, yaklaşan Kurban Bayramı nedeniyle aralıksız bir şekilde devam ediyor. Çanakkale İl Tarım ve Orman Müdürlüğü ekipleri, bu süreçte hayvan hareketlerini kontrol altında tutarak halk sağlığını koruma amacı gütmekte. Denetimlerin Önemi Denetimler, il müdürlüğüne bağlı veteriner hekimler tarafından gerçekleştiriliyor. Bu süreçte, üreticilerin korunması, kaçak nakillerin engellenmesi ve salgın hastalıkların yayılmasının önlenmesi hedefleniyor. Yerinde İnceleme İl Tarım ve Orman Müdürü Ergün Demirhan , denetimlerin yerinde incelemesini gerçekleştirdi. Sosyal Medya Açıklaması Alınan önlemler ve yürütülen çalışmalar hakkında İl Tarım ve Orman Müdürlüğü, sosyal medya üzerinden bir açıklamada bulundu. Açıklamada, "Sayın bakanımızın direktifleri doğrultusunda, tüketicimizin güvenilir gıdaya ulaşması ve hayvansal üretimimizin sürdürülebilirliği için gece gündüz demeden çalışmalarımıza devam edeceğiz" ifadelerine yer verildi. 1915 ÇANAKKALE KÖPRÜSÜNDE HAYVAN SEVK KONTROLLERİ ARALIKSIZ DEVAM EDİYOR.

title: Ο Νετανιάχου συνεχάρη τον ισραηλινό στρατό γιατί αναχαίτισε το στολίσκο ακτιβιστών για τη Γάζα: «Συνεχίστε μέχρι τέλους»
content: Ο στολίσκος «Global Sumud Flotilla» με ακτιβιστές που θέλουν να φτάσουν στη Γάζα για να παραδώσουν ανθρωπιστική βοήθεια στον παλαιστινιακό θύλακα, ήρθε αντιμέτωπος με ισραηλινές δυνάμεις, δήλωσε σήμερα (18λ05.2026) ο Μπέντζαμιν Νετανιάχου . Ειδικότερα, ο Μπέντζαμιν Νετανιάχουν επιβεβαίωσε τις πληροφορίες ότι ο ισραηλινός στρατός αναχαίτισε τον στολίσκο «Global Sumud Flotilla» που κατευθυνόταν προς την Γάζα, ενώ βίντεο απο το περιστατικό έχουν ήδη γίνει viral στα social media τις τελευταίες ώρες. «Διεξάγετε αυτήν την επιχείρηση με αξιοσημείωτη επιτυχία... Συνεχίστε μέχρι τέλους», είπε ο Ισραήινός πρωθυπουργός στον διοικητή των ισραηλινών δυνάμεων του Πολεμικού Ναυτικού, που είναι υπεύθυνος για την επιχείρηση. Israeli Navy intercepts Global Sumud Flotilla in international waters The Israeli Navy has boarded vessels of the pro-Palestinian “Global Sumud Flotilla” in the Mediterranean Sea. The convoy consisted of 54 vessels carrying around 500 anti-Israel and pro-Hamas activists from 45... pic.twitter.com/TVtW8hAZag — Visegrád 24 (@visegrad24) May 18, 2026 «Πιστεύω... ότι ματαιώνετε ένα κακόβουλο σχέδιο που έχει σχεδιαστεί για να σπάσει τον αποκλεισμό που έχουμε επιβάλει στους τρομοκράτες της Χαμάς στη Γάζα », πρόσθεσε ο Νετανιάχου, σύμφωνα με ανακοίνωση του γραφείου του. PM Benjamin Netanyahu in a conversation with the commander of Flotilla 3 during the takeover of the flotilla that left Turkey: “You are doing an outstanding job and neutralizing a malicious plan designed to break the isolation we are imposing on Hamas terrorists in Gaza.” — Prime Minister of Israel (@IsraeliPM) May 18, 2026 Ισραηλινές στρατιωτικές δυνάμεις αναχαίτισαν ανοικτά της Κύπρου τον «στολίσκο Global Sumud για την Γάζα» που αποτελείται από μια πενηνταριά σκάφη τα οποία είχαν αποπλεύσει από την νότια Τουρκία την περασμένη εβδομάδα, ανακοίνωσαν μέσω του Χ οι οργανωτές. To άρθρο Ο Νετανιάχου συνεχάρη τον ισραηλινό στρατό γιατί αναχαίτισε το στολίσκο ακτιβιστών για τη Γάζα: «Συνεχίστε μέχρι τέλους» δημοσιεύτηκε στο NewsIT .

Fantasy Premier League Gameweek 37 (so far) review: Abandon Aston Villa and thanks for the memories, Harry Wilson
content: We may be approaching the end of the season but this gameweek is far from over. There are still three huge matches remaining, which could completely change the Fantasy Premier League landscape before managers make their final moves of the season. Arsenal host Burnley tonight (Monday) at 8pm UK time (3pm ET) before Tuesday gives us two massive fixtures with Bournemouth vs Manchester City (7.30pm UK/2.30pm ET) and Chelsea vs Tottenham Hotspur (8.15pm UK/3.15pm ET). Those matches will have a huge impact on the title race, European qualification, relegation and potentially rotation for the final gameweek of the season. This weekend also gave us some clear signals around which teams are still motivated and which sides may already be looking ahead to the summer break. As ever, here we will cover the main FPL talking points from the gameweek so far. Villa assets now look like sells Aston Villa officially qualifying for the Champions League completely changes the picture for them. With domestic objectives now secured, Unai Emery’s full attention will surely turn towards Europe. Villa have the Europa League final against Freiburg just four days before their final Premier League game of the season, which immediately raises huge concerns about rotation and managed minutes. That makes Villa assets very difficult to trust now, despite their good form and 4-2 win over Liverpool. Ollie Watkins (£8.7m) owners suddenly have a problem. Even if he starts, there is every chance his minutes are reduced on Sunday after potential exertions in Wednesday’s European final. The same applies to Morgan Rogers (£7.4m) and Villa’s defenders. Emery’s team no longer need to go full intensity in the league. Plus, an away game to Manchester City isn’t the ideal fixture anyway. The Wilson hype train grinds to a halt Fulham’s European hopes now look slim following their 1-1 draw against bottom-of-the-table Wolves. Harry Wilson (£5.9m) being dropped was a major warning sign for FPL managers. He had become a differential over recent weeks, but his form has dipped and his minutes have also dwindled. Wilson has had a fine season with 10 goals and eight assists, but now looks like an easy sell given the circumstances. Fulham play Newcastle United at home on the last day of the season, which isn’t a bad fixture on paper, but they have lost two and drawn one in their last three, so their form isn’t the best. İzmit Belediyesinden bayram öncesi esnafa izin
content: Kurban Bayramı hareketliliği nedeniyle esnafın talepleri doğrultusunda yapılan düzenleme kapsamında; 23 Mayıs Cumartesi, 24 Mayıs Pazar, 25 Mayıs Pazartesi ve arife günü olan 26 Mayıs Salı günlerinde esnaf, bayramlık ürünlerini iş yerlerinin ön kısmında sergileyebilecek. YAYA GEÇİŞİ ENGELLENMEYECEK İzmit Belediyesi tarafından yapılan bilgilendirmede, uygulamanın belirli kurallar çerçevesinde yürütüleceği vurgulandı. Esnafın ürünlerini yola taşırmadan, kaldırımlarda vatandaşların rahat ve güvenli şekilde yürüyebileceği alan bırakacak biçimde düzenleme yapması istendi. ESNAFA KOLAYLIK, VATANDAŞA GÜVENLİ GEÇİŞBayram öncesinde hem esnafın ticari hareketliliğine katkı sunmak hem de vatandaşların alışverişlerini rahat şekilde yapabilmesini sağlamak amacıyla alınan karar doğrultusunda, zabıta ekipleri kent genelinde denetimlerini sürdürecek. Kurallara uygun hareket eden esnafa kolaylık sağlanırken, yaya güvenliğini tehlikeye düşürecek uygulamalara izin verilmeyecek.

Gemini: in arrivo il livello di ragionamento "Extended" e integrazioni con app esterne
content: A poche ore di distanza dal Google I/O 2026 , l’app Gemini continua a ricevere novità. Alcuni utenti stanno vedendo comparire un’opzione chiamata "Thinking level" , inserita nel selettore dei modelli e pensata per scegliere quanto tempo concedere al modello nella gestione di determinate richieste . Al momento, il rilascio sarebbe limitato ad un numero ristretto di utenti. La voce compare nella parte inferiore del pannello di selezione dei modelli e viene mostrata quando si scelgono Fast , basato su Gemini 3 Flash , oppure Pro , indicato nell’interfaccia come avanzato per matematica e codice con Gemini 3.1 Pro . La modalità Thinking resta invece esclusa da questo nuovo controllo. Le opzioni disponibili sono due: "Standard" ed "Extended". Gli screenshot aiutano a capire meglio il funzionamento dell’interfaccia . In un caso, con Pro selezionato, il livello di pensiero risulta impostato su "Standard"; in un altro, con Fast selezionato, la stessa voce appare impostata su "Extended". Aprendo il menu dedicato, Gemini mostra le due scelte in modo più esplicito : "Standard", descritta come l’opzione migliore per la maggior parte dei problemi, ed "Extended", pensata per concedere più tempo ai temi complessi. Il miglior iPhone di sempre? Apple iPhone 17 Pro , compralo al miglior prezzo da Avhd.it a 1,068 euro . CLICCA QUI PER CONTINUARE A LEGGERE

"Будет катастрофа": Трамп ответил на вопрос, кто будет его преемником
content: Дональд Трамп прокомментировал вопрос о своем возможном преемнике и предупредил о рисках неправильного выбора будущего лидера Соединенных Штатов. Среди кандидатов на пост президента США назвали Джей Ди Венса, Марко Рубио и Дональда Трампа-младшего. Во время интервью для Fortune Дональда Трампа спросили, кто мог бы лучше продолжить стиль его политики и подход к заключению международных и внутренних "сделок". Среди потенциальных кандидатов для Трампа журналисты назвали сына президента Дональда Трампа-младшего, госсекретаря Марко Рубио и вице-президента Джей Ди Венса. Однако Трамп не стал прямо называть фаворита или конкретного наследника. "Кто бы ни получил эту должность, он будет очень важным", - сказал Трамп. Как пишут журналисты Fortune, именно в момент этого вопроса Венс незаметно вошел в комнату и услышал ответ президента. Далее Трамп добавил, что ошибка в выборе следующего лидера может дорого стоить для США. "А если вы получите не того человека, то будет катастрофа", - заявил Трамп. Ранее портал "Комментарии" сообщал, что Дональд Трамп назвал кого хотел бы видеть в президентах США после себя. По его словам, он не прочь был бы снова баллотироваться на пост главы государства, однако Конституция не позволяет занимать этот пост более двух сроков. Также "Комментарии" писали, что профессор из США высмеял заявления Трампа о скором мире в Украине . По мнению эксперта, постоянные заявления Трампа о "близком мире" уже давно превратились в политический шум, не имеющий реального влияния на ситуацию на фронте.

title: Arrowsmith Search and Rescue establishes a legacy fund
content: Jack McLean left a lasting investment and legacy for his community. After McLean died, Arrowsmith Search and Rescue said they received a property from the estate of McLean, of Coombs. ASAR, which called McLean’s gift “significant,” eventually sold the donated property and the proceeds established the Arrowsmith Search and Rescue Legacy Fund, an endowment fund administered by the Parksville Qualicum Community Foundation What McLean left behind is more than a memory, according to an ASAR press release. It will ensure that ASAR can continue to serve the region for generations to come. “ASAR is deeply grateful to Jack and is committed to honouring his legacy by building this endowment into a lasting foundation for search and rescue services in the region,” the press release stated. While the legacy fund serves as a long-term investment that strengthens ASAR’s ability to plan ahead and remain resilient in the face of future challenges, it is not intended to replace annual donations or community fundraising efforts and does not mean the funding needs of ASAR’s funding have been met. The generosity of individuals, businesses and partners will continue to play a critical role in ensuring ASAR can operate at a high level and respond when it matters most. Held and managed by the community foundation, the legacy fund is designed to grow steadily over the coming decades. The long-term vision is for the fund to provide a reliable baseline of financial support, helping to sustain operations and provide stability regardless of the funding pressures of any given year. ASAR has grown strategically in recent years to meet increasing demand for emergency services across the region and in mutual aid responses. The organization is operationally strong and rescue ready, but the costs of maintaining that standard of preparedness continue to rise. Its core funding needs include ongoing operational costs to keep the organization running year-round: equipment, training, and maintenance required to maintain Rescue Ready status; and building costs including the remaining debt on ASAR’s facility. There are many ways to contribute, from annual donations that support day-to-day operations, to legacy giving through estate planning. Individuals working with lawyers, notaries, financial planners, or insurance advisors are encouraged to consider including ASAR in their estate plans. ASAR extends its sincere thanks to the individuals, businesses, and partners whose generosity continues to...

पीएम मोदी की अपील का असर, घोड़े पर सवार होकर ब्लॉक पहुंचे जिला परिषद उपाध्यक्ष
content: साहिबगंज से सुनील ठाकुर की रिपोर्ट Sahibganj News: पश्चिम एशिया में बढ़ते तनाव और ऊर्जा संकट के बीच पेट्रोल-डीजल बचाने की अपील का असर अब छोटे शहरों और कस्बों तक दिखाई देने लगा है. झारखंड के साहिबगंज में सोमवार को एक अनोखी तस्वीर देखने को मिली, जब जिला परिषद उपाध्यक्ष सुनील यादव घोड़े पर सवार होकर सदर प्रखंड सह अंचल कार्यालय पहुंचे. उनके इस अलग अंदाज को देखकर कार्यालय परिसर में मौजूद लोग हैरान रह गए. देखते ही देखते वहां लोगों की भीड़ जुट गई और हर कोई इस अनोखी पहल की चर्चा करने लगा. लग्जरी गाड़ियों के शौकीन हैं सुनील यादव जिला परिषद उपाध्यक्ष सुनील यादव जिले में अपने अलग और आकर्षक अंदाज के लिए पहले से चर्चित रहे हैं. आमतौर पर वे लग्जरी गाड़ियों के काफिले के साथ नजर आते हैं. बताया जाता है कि उनके पास कई महंगी गाड़ियां हैं और वे अक्सर थार वाहन से चलते हैं. लेकिन सोमवार को उन्होंने पूरी तरह अलग संदेश देने की कोशिश की. चारपहिया या दोपहिया वाहन के बजाय वे घोड़े पर सवार होकर ब्लॉक कार्यालय पहुंचे. लोगों के लिए यह दृश्य बिल्कुल नया था, इसलिए आसपास के लोग मोबाइल निकालकर वीडियो और तस्वीरें बनाने लगे. पीएम मोदी की अपील से हुए प्रेरित सुनील यादव ने कहा कि प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी द्वारा पेट्रोल-डीजल की बचत और ऊर्जा संरक्षण को लेकर दिए गए संदेश से प्रेरित होकर उन्होंने यह कदम उठाया है. उन्होंने कहा कि देशहित में ईंधन की बचत करना आज समय की जरूरत बन गई है. लगातार बढ़ती पेट्रोल-डीजल खपत न केवल आर्थिक बोझ बढ़ा रही है, बल्कि पर्यावरण के लिए भी गंभीर चुनौती बनती जा रही है. देशहित की शुरुआत खुद से करनी होगी: सुनील यादव ब्लॉक परिसर में मौजूद लोगों को संबोधित करते हुए सुनील यादव ने कहा कि अगर समाज में बदलाव लाना है तो उसकी शुरुआत खुद से करनी होगी. उन्होंने कहा कि उनका घोड़े पर सवार होकर कार्यालय पहुंचना केवल दिखावा नहीं, बल्कि लोगों को जागरूक करने का प्रयास है. उन्होंने कहा कि छोटी-छोटी पहल मिलकर बड़े बदलाव का रास्ता तैयार करती हैं. यदि लोग अनावश्यक वाहन उपयोग कम करें और वैकल्पिक उपाय अपनाएं, तो इससे ईंधन की बचत के साथ-साथ पर्यावरण संरक्षण में भी मदद मिलेगी. सोशल मीडिया पर भी छाया मामला सुनील यादव ने अपनी इस पहल की तस्वीरें और वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर भी साझा किए. उन्होंने अपने पोस्ट में लिखा कि “जब देशहित की बात हो, तो पहल खुद से शुरू करनी चाहिए.” उनकी पोस्ट वायरल होने के बाद सोशल मीडिया पर भी लोगों की अलग-अलग प्रतिक्रियाएं सामने आने लगीं. कई लोगों ने इसे पर्यावरण संरक्षण और ऊर्जा बचत की दिशा में सकारात्मक कदम बताया, जबकि कुछ लोगों ने इसे अलग अंदाज में प्रचार पाने की कोशिश भी कहा. इलाके में चर्चा का विषय बनी पहल साहिबगंज में इस पहल की चर्चा सिर्फ प्रशासनिक हलकों तक सीमित नहीं रही, बल्कि आम लोगों के बीच भी यह बड़ा विषय बन गया. जिले के कई लोग इसे एक प्रतीकात्मक संदेश मान रहे हैं....

Od Horgoša do Novog Sada: Počinje projekat koji menja snabdevanje naftom
content: Srbija je napravila važan korak ka izgradnji strateškog naftovoda koji će povezati Novi Sad i Mađarsku, nakon što je kompanija Transnafta dodelila ugovor za izvođenje radova konzorcijumu predvođenom firmom MVM Južna Bačka. Vrednost posla procenjuje se na oko 17,4 milijardi dinara sa PDV-om, a projekat bi, prema ocenama stručnjaka, mogao značajno da promeni energetsku mapu Srbije i smanji zavisnost zemlje od jednog pravca snabdevanja sirovom naftom. U konzorcijumu koji je dobio posao, pored Južne Bačke, nalaze se i kompanije Konvar, Delta inženjering, Zavod za zavarivanje, Čelik iz Bačkog Jarka i Delta preving. Najveći deo posla – oko 43 odsto – pripao je upravo Južnoj Bački. Tender je raspisan krajem prošle godine, a u dokumentaciji je naglašeno da je projekat proglašen pitanjem nacionalnog interesa zbog potrebe diversifikacije energetskih pravaca i jačanja sigurnosti domaćeg tržišta nafte. Novi magistralni naftovod povezaće Srbiju sa mađarskim sistemom koji je priključen na veliki naftovod „Družba“, jedan od ključnih evropskih pravaca za transport sirove nafte. Time bi Srbija prvi put dobila alternativni pravac snabdevanja, pošto se trenutno najveći deo uvoza odvija preko Hrvatske i naftovoda JANAF. Projekat je planiran za transport nafte tipa REB („Russian Export Blend“), a godišnji kapacitet naftovoda iznosiće oko 5,5 miliona tona. Trasa naftovoda kroz Srbiju biće duga približno 113 kilometara i u potpunosti podzemna. Početna tačka nalaziće se kod Horgoša, u blizini granice sa Mađarskom, dok će krajnja tačka biti Terminal Transnafta u Novom Sadu. Naftovod će prolaziti kroz teritorije Kanjiže, Sente, Ade, Bečeja, Žablja i Novog Sada, prateći pravac sever–jug. Pored energetskog značaja, očekuje se da projekat donese i dodatne infrastrukturne investicije, nova angažovanja domaćih firmi i jačanje logističkog položaja Srbije u regionu. Piše: Nina Stojanović Чланак Od Horgoša do Novog Sada: Počinje projekat koji menja snabdevanje naftom се појављује прво на Vesti Online .

Ahmet Hamdi Tanpınar Ortaokulu'nun Futsal Başarısı
content: Ahmet Hamdi Tanpınar Ortaokulu'ndan Futsal Başarısı Eski futbolcu Taner Aykut'un yönettiği Ahmet Hamdi Tanpınar Ortaokulu , futsal alanında Türkiye’nin en iyi sekiz takımı arasında yer aldı. Gençlik ve Spor Bakanlığı tarafından düzenlenen 2025-2026 sezonu Okullar Arası Türkiye Futsal Yarı Final Müsabakaları'nda elde edilen bu başarı, okulu ve Erzurum'u gururlandırdı. Elazığ'da Şampiyonluk Okul, Elazığ'da gerçekleştirilen Bölge Birinciliği etabını birinci olarak tamamlayarak Türkiye’nin en dikkat çeken sekiz takımı arasına yükseldi. Taner Aykut, müdürlük koltuğuna oturduğu günden bu yana okuldaki futsal kültürünü geliştirmek için büyük çaba gösterdi. Ahmet Hamdi Tanpınar Ortaokulu antrenörleri Fikrettin Koç ve Fatih Kula , bu başarıda önemli rol oynamakla birlikte Erzurum’un futsal alanındaki görünürlüğüne katkı sağladılar. Sivas'a Yolculuk Şimdi Sivas'ta düzenlenecek Türkiye Yarı Finallerine hazırlanıyorlar. Erzurum’u temsil edecek sporcular, antrenörlerin öncülüğünde büyük bir heyecanla başarıya odaklanmış durumda. Antrenörler Koç ve Kula, destek sağlayan Gençlik ve Spor İl Müdürü Levent Çakmur , Spor Hizmetleri Müdürü Erdoğan Dönmez ve Taner Aykut’a teşekkür ettiler. Erzurum İçin Bir İlk Ahmet Hamdi Tanpınar Ortaokulu, futsalda Erzurum için bir ilki gerçekleştirerek, büyük bir başarıya imza attı. Okul müdürü Taner Aykut'un spor geçmişi, bu başarıda etkili oldu. Yedi yıl önce yalnızca eğitim hizmeti veren okul, Taner Aykut'un atanmasından sonra başarının tadını çıkarmaya başladı. Erzurumlu sporseverler, “Okul müdürünün spordan gelmesi, başarılara zemin hazırlıyor” diyerek bu durumu değerlendirdiler. ERZURUMSPOR’UN ESKİ FUTBOLCULARINDAN TANER AYKUT’UN OKUL MÜDÜRLÜĞÜNÜ YAPTIĞI AHMET HAMDİ TANPINAR ORTAOKULU, FUTSALDA TÜRKİYE’NİN EN İYİ 8 TAKIMI ARASINA ADINI YAZDIRDI.

title: मौनी रॉय से अलगाव के बाद बोले सूरज नांबियार, दिशा पाटनी का नाम ना लें मीडिया
content: डिजिटल डेस्क, मुंबई। मौनी रॉय और उनके पति सूरज नांबियार के अलगाव की खबरों के बीच अब दिशा पाटनी का नाम भी लगातार चर्चाओं में आ रहा था। इन अफवाहों पर अब सूरज नांबियार ने चुप्पी तोड़ते हुए लंबा बयान जारी किया है। उन्होंने सोशल मीडिया पर चल रही खबरों को पूरी तरह बेबुनियाद और दुर्भाग्यपूर्ण बताया। सूरज ने कहा कि उनके, मौनी या किसी तीसरे व्यक्ति को लेकर लगाए जा रहे आरोपों में कोई सच्चाई नहीं है। निर्दोष दोस्तों को इस मामले में घसीटना गलत है। यह भी पढ़े - कान्स फिल्म फेस्टिवल में छाई 'बॉम्बे स्टोरीज', सेक्स वर्कर के किरदार पर खुलकर बोलीं अनुप्रिया गोयनका सूरज ने साफ कहा कि लोग बिना किसी पुष्टि के मनगढ़ंत कहानियां फैला रहे हैं, जिसका वह विरोध करते हैं। मौनी और मैंने हमेशा एक-दूसरे के प्रति सम्मानजनक व्यवहार किया है और मीडिया से भी वही सम्मान बनाए रखने की उम्मीद करते हैं। सूरज ने लोगों से उनकी प्राइवेसी का सम्मान करने और आगे बढ़ने के लिए समय देने की अपील की। बता दें, दोनों ने 14 मई को संयुक्त बयान जारी कर अलग होने की जानकारी दी थी। मौनी और सूरज ने 27 जनवरी 2022 को गोवा में शादी की थी। यह भी पढ़े - शिवकार्तिकेयन की 'सेयोन' की दमदार अंदाज के साथ शूटिंग शुरू, कमल हासन की मौजूदगी ने बढ़ाया उत्साह

Church Street Home Surrounded by Police in Hanover Park
content: A quiet stretch of Hanover Park’s Church Street turned tense Monday morning as police shut down several nearby roads and told residents to stay inside while officers focused on a single home in the 6500 block, neighbors said. People living nearby reported being instructed to remain indoors as officers used a loudspeaker to urge someone in the house to come out with their hands up. Streets Closed Off As Officers Work The Scene Multiple intersections were blocked as the situation unfolded. Church Street was closed at Walnut and at Lake, and Maple was shut down at both Barrington and Church while officers worked the scene, according to ABC7 Chicago . Neighbors told the station they heard loudspeaker announcements roughly every 15 minutes calling for a person inside to “come out of his house with hands up.” Those details all came from residents on the block; ABC7 Chicago noted that Hanover Park police had not yet provided an on-the-record statement at the time of its report. Where This Happened And What The Area Looks Like The closures were centered around the village’s Church Street Station area, a transit-adjacent neighborhood near the Hanover Park Metra stop. The village recently wrapped up its Church Street & Walnut Avenue multi-modal project to improve walking and biking access in the area, according to the Village of Hanover Park . Hanover Park’s Police Department is headquartered at 2011 Lake Street and publishes local advisories, including Nixle traffic alerts, for residents. The department’s contact details are listed on the village’s online police page . What Officials Are Saying So Far As of the initial reporting, authorities had not publicly explained what triggered the standoff, according to ABC7 Chicago . It was also not yet clear whether anyone had been arrested or injured. With official statements limited, neighbors’ accounts supplied most of the early detail, and the village’s public channels had not posted a fuller update at the time of those reports. This story will be updated if Hanover Park police release additional information. Anyone with information about the incident can contact the Hanover Park Police Department at 630-823-5500.

title: Dicle Kaymakamı Mustafa Atış, Öğrencilerle Temizlik Etkinliği Düzenledi
content: Dicle Kaymakamı, Öğrencilerle Çevre Temizliği Gerçekleştirdi Diyarbakır’ın Dicle İlçesi Kaymakamı Mustafa Atış , Dicle Orman İşletme Şefliği’nin düzenlediği "Orman Benim" kampanyası kapsamında, Kocaalan Yatılı Bölge Ortaokulu öğrencileriyle bir araya gelerek okul bahçesinde temizlik etkinliği gerçekleştirdi. Farkındalık Yaratma Amacıyla Etkinlik Düzenlendi Etkinliğe, Kaymakam Mustafa Atış , Dicle Orman İşletme Şefi Tuğçe Aksoy Oral , Kocaalan YİBO Müdürü Ahmet Gül , çok sayıda öğretmen ve öğrenci katıldı. Gerçekleştirilen bu temizlik faaliyeti ile çevredeki atıkların ve yanıcı maddelerin temizlenmesi, orman yangınlarına karşı risklerin azaltılması ve çevre bilincinin artırılması hedeflendi. Kaymakam Atış’tan Çevre Mesajı Kaymakam Mustafa Atış , etkinlikte yaptığı konuşmada, "Gelecek nesillere sağlıklı bir çevre bırakmak için tüm çabaları destekliyorum. Kocaalan YİBO’da düzenlenen çöp toplama etkinliğine katılarak, çevre bilincinin yaygınlaştırılmasına katkıda bulunmak istedim. Yaz aylarında vatandaşlarımızın orman yangınları ve çevre kirliliğine karşı duyarlı olmaları önem taşıyor. Yeşil vatanımız için çalışmaya devam edeceğiz" şeklinde konuştu. DİYARBAKIR'IN DİCLE İLÇE KAYMAKAMI MUSTAFA ATIŞ, DİCLE ORMAN İŞLETME ŞEFLİĞİ TARAFINDAN, "ORMAN BENİM" KAMPANYASI KAPSAMINDA KOCAALAN YATILI BÖLGE ORTAOKULU (YİBO) ÖĞRENCİLERİYLE BİRLİKTE OKUL BAHÇESİNİ TEMİZLEDİ.

title: La Guardia Civil abre una investigación para esclarecer las causas del incendio en una nave de Peligros, aún activo
European circus brings high energy, all-human spectacle to Kingston
content: A European-style circus rolled into Kingston for the first time, promising a high-energy showcase of human performance under the big top in the parking lot at the Cataraqui Centre. Nouveau Cirque Mondial will dazzle Kingston audiences for the next week until it leaves to continue its multi-city Canadian tour. The production blends traditional circus artistry with modern staging in what organizers describe as a “100 per cent human” show — featuring no animals or digital effects, only live performers pushing the limits of strength, agility and precision. Under an intimate one-ring tent set up outside the shopping centre, audiences are brought close to the action, with acts ranging from aerial silks and acrobatics to knife-throwing, juggling and clowning. The two-hour performance includes 11 acts featuring a mix of veteran international artists and emerging talent, part of an approach designed to create what organizers call a “living, evolving circus.” Among them is Romanian performer Carmen Rosca, whose knife-throwing act puts a modern spin on a classic circus staple. The act pairs her with her husband, strongman Vitalie Rosca, who stands as her target during a series of precision throws. Rosca, who has spent roughly a decade working across Europe before joining Cirque Mondial five years ago, said the Canadian tour marked a milestone in her career. “I dreamed to work one day in America and Canada, and now look what happened,” she said in an interview. “Now it’s here. I’m happy for a new experience in my life.” The Kingston stop follows earlier dates across Ontario and will be followed by shows in Ottawa and several stops in Quebec throughout the summer. Rosca said audience reactions in Canada have felt familiar, though she noticed subtle differences compared to European crowds. “It is a new experience,” she said, adding Canadian audiences were “a little shy... more calm” than those she had performed for overseas. Her path into circus life was not traditional. Unlike many performers who grow up in circus families, Rosca said she discovered the art form later, after seeing a show and deciding to try it herself. “I like to do something unique in my life,” she said. “This act exist in circus, but just the men do this, and the assistant is the girl. But me, I wanted to change this.” Rosca said she experimented with different styles before developing her own technique, despite early doubts from instructors. “They said, ‘Maybe you will not be good,’ ” she said....
